Metadata.title: GeoBiz — Business Management SaaS Platform
Metadata.description: GeoBiz — #1 business management platform in Georgia. Complete management for hotels, restaurants, beauty salons, shops, breweries, wineries, and distilleries on one platform. Start free.
Metadata.ogDescription: Complete management for hotels, restaurants, beauty salons, shops, breweries, wineries, and distilleries on one platform.

Hero.title: GeoBiz
Hero.subtitle: Multi-Module Business Management Platform
Hero.description: One platform for every business — from hotels to restaurants, beauty salons to retail shops

Modules.title: Modules
Modules.subtitle: Choose the module that fits your business
Modules.noModulesHint: Please check Super Admin to ensure modules are enabled and saved.

hotel.name: Hotel
hotel.description: Complete hotel management system — room reservations, check-in/check-out, Channel Manager (Booking.com, Airbnb), Facebook Messenger Bot, and more

restaurant.name: Restaurant
restaurant.description: Restaurant management — table reservations, order management, menu, and analytics

beauty.name: Beauty Salon
beauty.description: Beauty salon management — appointment scheduling, client database, financial analytics

shop.name: Retail Shop
shop.description: Modern POS system — point-of-sale terminal, inventory management, fiscal integration with RS.ge

brewery.name: Brewery
brewery.description: Brewery management — full production process, tank cleaning, inventory, equipment, finance, and sales

winery.name: Winery
winery.description: Winery management — vineyard monitoring, production, barrels, and sales

distillery.name: Distillery
distillery.description: Distillery management — production processes, barrel management, sales, and analytics
